title: Abstract Classes 👻
description: Create strict rules and empty templates that other classes MUST follow.

slides.title: The Ghost Blueprint 👻
slides.content:
# A Concept, Not a Thing

Think about the word 'Shape'. What does a physical 'Shape' look like? You can't picture it.
You can picture a Circle, or a Square, but 'Shape' is just an abstract concept.

In programming, an **Abstract Class** is a blueprint that is so generic, Dart FORBIDS you from ever actually building an object out of it!

slides.title: Making it Abstract 🛡️

quizData.question: What happens if you try to literally build an abstract class: `Shape s1 = Shape();`?

options.text: Dart throws an error because abstract classes cannot be instantiated (built).

quizData.explanation: Abstract classes are purely for structuring other classes. You can never build a direct physical instance of them.

slides.title: The Contract 📜

quizData.explanation: Placing 'abstract' before the class keyword creates the template.

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: If you erased the `@override void calculateArea()` inside `Circle`, the whole program would instantly break!
